utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2) travel_dates: Provided as 'June 11–15, 2024' – fully specified.
3) transportation: Provided with flight details (type: budget airline, economy, return, refundable) and cost €145 – fully specified.
4) accommodation: Provided with hotel name/type/location, details (nights, per night rate, cancellation), and cost €600 – fully specified.
5) activities: Two activities listed with names, details, and costs – fully specified.
6) additional_services: Provided (flexible_bookings and refund_policy) – but no costs stated. The requirement says 'any extra services with costs'. Since costs are missing, this is not fully specified.
7) total_budget: Provided with grand_total and remaining_budget – fully specified.
Thus, 6 of the 7 items are fully specified.
